mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shipment ( orderNo, sellerUid, courierName, trackingNo, status, shippedAt, createdAt ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{sellerUid}, #{courierName}, #{trackingNo}, #{status}, CASE WHEN #{status} = 'SHIPPING' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END, NOW() )

INSERT INTO shipment_item (shipmentNo, orderItemNo, quantity) VALUES
(#{item.shipmentNo}, #{item.orderItemNo}, #{item.quantity})
mapper.update: UPDATE shipment SET status = 'SHIPPING', shippedAt = COALESCE(shippedAt, NOW()) WHERE status = 'READY' AND createdAt <= NOW()
UPDATE shipment SET status = 'DELIVERED', deliveredAt = COALESCE(deliveredAt, NOW()) WHERE status = 'SHIPPING' AND shippedAt <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MINUTE)
UPDATE shipment SET status = 'RETURNED', deliveredAt = COALESCE(deliveredAt, NOW()) WHERE status = 'RETURN_SHIPPING' AND shippedAt <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MINUTE)
UPDATE shipment SET status = 'EXCHANGE_WAITING', deliveredAt = COALESCE(deliveredAt, NOW()) WHERE status = 'EXCHANGE_SHIPPING' AND createdAt <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY)

UPDATE order_item oi JOIN shipment_item si ON si.orderItemNo = oi.orderItemNo JOIN shipment sh ON sh.shipmentNo = si.shipmentNo SET oi.itemStatus = #{itemStatus} WHERE sh.status = #{shipmentStatus} AND ( ( #{shipmentStatus} IN ('SHIPPING', 'DELIVERED') AND oi.itemStatus NOT IN ( 'CONFIRMED', 'RETURN_REQUESTED', 'EXCHANGE_REQUESTED', 'CANCEL_REQUESTED', 'RETURN_SHIPPING', 'EXCHANGE_SHIPPING', 'EXCHANGE_WAITING', 'RETURNED', 'EXCHANGED', 'CANCELED' ) ) OR (#{shipmentStatus} = 'RETURNED' AND oi.itemStatus = 'RETURN_SHIPPING') OR (#{shipmentStatus} = 'EXCHANGE_WAITING' AND oi.itemStatus = 'EXCHANGE_SHIPPING') )

UPDATE shipment sh JOIN shipment_item si ON si.shipmentNo = sh.shipmentNo SET sh.status = #{status}, sh.shippedAt = CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('RETURN_SHIPPING', 'EXCHANGE_SHIPPING') THEN COALESCE(sh.shippedAt, NOW()) ELSE sh.shippedAt END, sh.deliveredAt = CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('RETURNED', 'EXCHANGE_WAITING') THEN COALESCE(sh.deliveredAt, NOW()) ELSE sh.deliveredAt END WHERE si.orderItemNo = #{orderItemNo} AND sh.shipmentNo = ( SELECT latest.shipmentNo FROM ( SELECT sh2.shipmentNo FROM shipment sh2 JOIN shipment_item si2 ON si2.shipmentNo = sh2.shipmentNo WHERE si2.orderItemNo = #{orderItemNo} ORDER BY sh2.shipmentNo DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest )

if.test: (searchType == null or keyword == null) and sellerUid != null and sellerUid != ''

mapper.select:
SELECT sh.shipmentNo, oi.orderItemNo, sh.orderNo, oi.sellerUid, s.companyName AS sellerName, oi.prodNo AS prodNo, oi.productName AS prodName, p.thumb1FileId, si.quantity, oi.total AS itemTotal, oi.shippingFee, oi.itemStatus, o.receiver, o.phone, CONCAT('[', o.zipCode, '] ', o.addr1, ' ', COALESCE(o.addr2, '')) AS address, sh.courierName, sh.trackingNo, sh.status, sh.shippedAt, sh.createdAt, si.quantity AS itemCount FROM shipment sh JOIN `order` o ON o.orderNo = sh.orderNo JOIN shipment_item si ON si.shipmentNo = sh.shipmentNo JOIN order_item oi ON oi.orderItemNo = si.orderItemNo LEFT JOIN product p ON p.prodNo = oi.prodNo LEFT JOIN seller s ON s.uid = oi.sellerUid
ORDER BY sh.shipmentNo DESC, oi.orderItemNo ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shipment sh JOIN `order` o ON o.orderNo = sh.orderNo JOIN shipment_item si ON si.shipmentNo = sh.shipmentNo JOIN order_item oi ON oi.orderItemNo = si.orderItemNo LEFT JOIN product p ON p.prodNo = oi.prodNo LEFT JOIN seller s ON s.uid = oi.sellerUid
